title: Stir Fry with Leafy Greens
description: A simple and nutritious stir fry made with chewy and earthy mushrooms, leafy greens, and a hint of Chinese spice.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced ginger and minced garlic and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the mushrooms and cook for 3-4 minutes until they start to release their liquid and brown.
Add the leafy greens and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until wilted.
Add the soy sauce and chili flakes (if using) and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately over rice or noodles.
Optional: add some stir-fried tofu for extra protein.
